name: insomnia-plugin-slow-network

insomnia.name: slow-network
insomnia.description: Simulates slow network conditions (3G, EDGE, 2G) to test APIs under poor connectivity. Use the slow-network header with chunk|delay format or template tags for ready-made presets.

description: Simulates slow network conditions (3G, EDGE, 2G) to test APIs under poor connectivity. Use the slow-network header with chunk|delay format or template tags for ready-made presets.
